summary: ISS-933 is already resolved. Both PRED-SR-SUPPRESS and PRED-093 in predictions.json already contain the Domain 9 monitoring discrepancy observation. PRED-SR-SUPPRESS (updated 2026-04-14T00:15:32Z) states: Domain 9 currently reads Unscored — no G3+ storm observed despite NOAA SWPC confirmation of G3 levels during March 20-22. PRED-093 contains [ISS-924 UPDATE] with the same observation. All four curmudgeon holes from PRED-batch-updates-2026-04-13.json are addressed: (1) inductive reasoning counterargument engaged, (2) Domain 9 discrepancy noted, (3) literature citation specified as Rosales-Linares et al. 2019 with DOI, (4) hardcoded 93% replaced with qualitative language. No further analyst work needed.
